data.body: DECISION: DEFER — next_batch stays on the subprocess path. ticket-next-batch.sh is a ~900-line bash orchestrator (dependency graph + file-impact conflict scheduling) and the least latency-sensitive read (invoked once per batch dispatch, not in tight loops). Porting it in-process now carries high regression risk for negligible latency benefit. Re-evaluate only if/when a full Python engine port (#3) is undertaken; the native reads (#2) do not depend on it.
